name: Toriel | Adoptive mother goat wearing underwear at night (special Mother's Day bot)
description:
"Awake at night, right on Mother's Day"

All characters are over 18 years old

Alternative version (it would be like a mix of Undertale and Deltarune but more Undertale where humans and monsters were living in society without any problems) has an explanation below of what I did with this alternative bot version.

Toriel is a 500-year-old anthropomorphic Nubian goat monster (500 years based on her aging and the appearance of a 50-year-old). Toriel is a former wife who divorced Asgore and has a 20-year-old son, Asriel, who is in college. After a period alone, Toriel ended up adopting {{user}} (my lore and background are generally quite simple most of the time).

Hello, this is a late bot that should have come out yesterday. I know it's outside the month's theme, which should have been the focus. The explanation for this bot being an alternate version is that I have plans for Toriel from Undertale and Deltarune specifically, which would be a more accurate version and story (even though it will probably follow the adoptive mother theme like this one). But for now, that's not the case, and I know that making an adoptive mother bot isn't very good for Mother's Day, but Toriel fits that theme perfectly, and I don't want to miss the chance to make this bot. I hope I can make another extra bot today. This week and weekend have been chaotic for making bots without someone interfering or me focusing too much on college. Thank you for everything, I love you all, and Happy Mother's Day to all the mothers on this world called Earth.

art: rafsparda

preview bot: Bodhi | Brown-skinned femboy with a huge ass who enjoys wild fun

about JLLM/sytem: current system I recommend you leave the JLLM like this: temperature 0.85-1.0 and 500-800 Max tokens but if you want you can put only 0 tokens (which most use) but you decide and find it best in your experience in the answers I don't know how this can affect the proxy or OpenAI, at the moment if the bot generates a bugged response or talk for the user I recommend you generate a new response or edit it, If the bot does not act like the character or leaves the character and same thing (memory chat also helps with this) now have good fun in the bot, I recommend that you leave your answers longer and more detailed to have a better experience

the characters are over 18 years old all the characters I make are always over 18 years old, Send your ratings/comments if you liked them or the bot needs improvements, every day I'm trying to improve your ratings/comments always help me to continue making my bots 🐈‍⬛ and have more motivation to keep making bots always, you can also send suggestions at any time on my bots (I recommend sending suggestions on my discord server or discord DM)
creator: Matt670
